titles.title: There is nothing greater than grace

properties.verseOrder: V1 V2 C3 V4 C3 V5 C3 V6 C3

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: What do you say to someone Who feels like they’ve lost it all Over the edge, with no one there to break their fall And what do you say to someone Who feels so unloved Giving themselves away A little bit everyday Just to be good enough

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: And what do you say to a hopeless soul Who can’t remember their way home And everything is out of their control

verse.name: C3
verse.lines: There is no valley There is no darkness There is no sorrow Greater than the grace of Jesus There is no moment There is no distance There is no heartbreak He can’t take you through So before you think that you’re too lost to save Remember there is nothing greater than grace

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: What do you say to someone Whose life is on the line And they’re unsure what happens after their last breath in time What do you say to someone who’s built a wall you can’t break through And it’s so hard for them to hear the truth

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: What do you say to a life of regret That’s trying so hard to forget What do you say to dreams unmet

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: Don’t lose heart Don’t let go Don’t give up You are not alone
